properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We do not know the depths of drink the bitter cup requires We only ask that in it, God would work the purpose he desire We're resting in a sovereign promise at the perfect time The Lord will answer to our token life and start to turn the heart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Only God can turn the heart (Turn the heart) Redeem the sinner Bring home the lost All Satan drift away The Lord restores (He restores) It is sovereign When God turns the heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He hears you in the secret place in a setting on your knees You've reached desperation for a soul to be set free In His presence, calm assurance, settles deep within You released the lamb to the Shepherd's care He has a restoration plan

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For only God can turn the heart (Turn the heart) Redeem the sinner Bring home the lost All Satan drift away The Lord restores (He restores) It is sovereign When God turns the heart

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The cloak of heaviness you bore He will trade for garment of joy In Christ will be healing divine and perfect forgiveness you'll find Broken lives will be mended by Jesus Homes will be happy again Grant it to those who steadfastly believe Know they'll confess in the end

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It was God who turned the heart (Turned the heart) Redeemed the sinner Brought home the lost All Satan drifted away The Lord restored (He restored) It is sovereign When God turn the heart A total deliverance When God turn the heart When God turn the heart
